title: Ubiquiti PowerBeam M5 300mm, PBE-M5-300
description: Ubiquiti PBE-M5-300 is a powerful completely outdoor unit including 2x 22dBi (2x2 MIMO) antennas for the 5GHz band as a PtP or PtMP solution. The unit allows transmission speed up to 300Mbps Inside PowerBeam is a powerful MIPS processor Atheros 74KC with 560MHz frequency, 64MB RAM DDR2 memory and 8MB of Flash memory . Unit has also one ethernet port supports 10/100Mbps speed, and passive PoE 24V / 0.5A (802.3af PoE is not supported) Ubiquitiâs InnerFeed â¢ technology integrates the radio into the feedhorn of an antenna, so there is no need for cables to connect the radio to the antenna. This improves performance because it eliminates cable losses The form factor of the PowerBeam® features the highest gain for its size . The NanoBeamâs excellent beam directivity provides the best performance in high-noise environments Ubiquitiâs airMAX® technology is proven in millions of deployments worldwide, exhibiting outstanding performance in outdoor environments. The TDMA airMAX protocol enables unprecedented scalability, high throughput and low latency in multipoint networks Device Dish antenna Rear housing Holder PoE power adapter Power cord
